rationale: All derivatives metrics (funding rate, open interest) and correlation coefficients require either Coinglass PRO tier, paid API access (Binance/Bybit), or a Bloomberg/TradingView subscription — none of the specified free-tier sources publish pre-computed 30-day TON correlations or real-time TON perpetual funding data at no cost.
sources: https://www.coinglass.com/ton — Coinglass public page for TON shows aggregated OI chart visually but does NOT expose numeric OI or funding rate values via free API or scrapable table; premium plan required for CSV/API export.
https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/toncoin — CoinGecko free tier provides price, volume, market cap, but NO correlation coefficients or derivatives data.
https://defillama.com/chain/TON — DefiLlama covers TON TVL/DeFi metrics only; no derivatives or correlation data.
https://alternative.me/crypto/fear-and-greed-index/ — Market-wide sentiment index only; no asset-specific correlation or funding data.
https://fred.stlouisfed.org — Macro/NASDAQ data available but cross-asset correlation computation against TON requires combining with paid price feeds.
